LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANTHONY AMERICO SIPOS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE VOID DEFAULT JUDGMENT - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON AUGUST 25, 2009, IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS IMPROPER AS TO MR. ANTONIO SIPOS. THE COURT DENIES THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. MR. SIPOS RELIES ON CCP 128.5, BUT THAT PROVISION ONLY APPLIES TO ACTIONS THAT WERE COMMENCED PRIOR TO DECEMBER 31, 1994. SEE CCP 128.5 (B)(1). PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY FOR ENTRY OF A NEW JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR # 5153

Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For Entry Of New Judgment Per Court'S Order Dated Nov 26, 2012 is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will enter a new judgment with the correct name of the judgment debtor (Antonio Calvario individually dba Custom Door Company; Principal - $32,668.07; Attorney's fee -$2,350.00 ; Interest of $11,223.30 (10% interest from 8/25/09 to 1/30/12;) TOTAL JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $46,241.37). AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT ANTHONY AMERICO SIPOS AS AN INDIVIDUAL, AND DBA CUSTOM DOOR COMPANY'S AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Off calendar. Duplicate entry.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - STEVEN PISANO OF E.P. LEGAL SERVICES, INC. TEL. NO. (650) 367-1812 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANTHONY AMERICO SIPOS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE VOID DEFAULT JUDGMENT - The motion to vacate the judgment entered on August 25, 2009, is granted. The judgment is improper as to Mr. Antonio Sipos. The Court denies the request for sanctions. Mr. Sipos relies on CCP 128.5, but that provision only applies to actions that were commenced prior to December 31, 1994. See CCP 128.5 (b)(1). Plaintiff may apply for entry of a new judgment. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =302/EG

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Nov-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT ANTHONY AMERICO SIPOS AS AN INDIVIDUAL, AND DBA CUSTOM DOOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Continued on the court's own motion to November 26, 2012 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendants must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than November 14, 2012 at 4 pm, or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

Notice And Motion For Award Of Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Creditor Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau's motion for award of attorney's fees.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Peter H. Liederman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditor Trade Association, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Snyonio Calvario, a/k/a Antonio Americo Sipos, individually dba Custom Door Company.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau's motion for award of attorney's fees is GRANTED.

Order was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Continued To Oct-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert D. Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Robert Howell, President of Allwood Door Company, assignor in this matter, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Antonio Calvario, a/k/a Antonio Americo Sipos, individually dba Custom Door Company.
Default was entered against defendant June 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against Defaulted Defendant Antonio Calvario, a/k/a Antonio Americo Sipos, individually dba Custom Door Company as follows:

Damages/Principal - $28,189.87.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,003.20.
Attorney's Fees - To Be Determined by Motion.
Costs - $476.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $32,668.07.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
